blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Test design issue: test_awq_dual_dispatch.py creates engine without loading weights, so build_dispatch_cache() returns empty layer cache. Code inspection confirms correct implementation in engine.py lines 3455-3477.
AWQ model format detection: /opt/models/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ is detected as 'gptq' format. Need true AWQ model (zeros=0) to validate E2E. Running AWQ kernel with GPTQ weights causes NaN/Inf.

appliedUpdates.description: Added note about AWQ model format detection - need true AWQ model to test AWQ kernel E2E

VAL-AWQ-001.summary: AWQ dual kernel produces numerically correct output

VAL-AWQ-003.summary: AWQ dual kernel shows 3.4-5.8% speedup over GPTQ dual kernel

recommendations.description: Obtain true AWQ model (with zeros=0 in quantization) to validate VAL-AWQ-002 and VAL-AWQ-004 E2E
recommendations.rationale: Current AWQ model directory is detected as GPTQ format; AWQ kernel mode with GPTQ weights causes NaN/Inf

recommendations.description: Fix test_awq_dual_dispatch.py to load mock weights or use real model
recommendations.rationale: Test creates engine without weights, leading to empty layer cache and false failures
